# Refunds & Returns

This overview outlines the key elements of our refunds and returns policy, including the refund-application-window, refund-eligibility, the refund-review-process and refund-timelines, as well as return shipping costs and non-refundable-items. Specific durations, criteria, and exceptions are not defined here and are detailed in the sections below.
